layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-inverse font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary_hover transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,191,0,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,191,0,0.4)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_elevated text-primary border border-border/subtle px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all hover:border-primary/30

cards.base: bg-surface_glass backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
cards.market_stat_card: flex flex-col p-6 rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-white/5 relative overflow-hidden group

tables.wrapper: w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-2xl border border-white/5 bg-surface
tables.header: border-b border-white/5 bg-white/[0.02] text-left text-xs font-medium text-tertiary uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-6

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5
navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-surface border-r border-white/5 p-6

animations.stagger_children: Use Framer Motion with staggerChildren: 0.1 for lists and grids
animations.fade_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
animations.micro_interactions: Active states scale down slightly (scale: 0.98), hover states lift slightly (y: -2px)

image_urls.description: Abstract amber gold bokeh lights on dark background
Bitcoin coin illuminated with gold lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Mode theme with #0A0A0B as the base. Do NOT use pure black (#000000).
Use the exact font families specified: Cabinet Grotesk for headings, Manrope for body, JetBrains Mono for prices/tickers.
Implement the 'Golden Hour' / Amber aesthetic for the brand. The primary CTA color is #FFBF00. Avoid generic blue or purple gradients.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
For the Top 10 Live Crypto Prices table, use the CoinGecko API. Format numbers clearly using the mono font, with standard green/red colors for 24h change.
Build a card-based layout for the Dashboard using the glassmorphism rules defined in components.cards.
The Hero section should have a dark, immersive feel. Use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy black/80 overlay to allow the amber accents to pop.
Ensure the layout is mobile-first and fully responsive.
